default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy sprint standup to discuss progress and updates across multiple client projects.](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content OS setup for new client nearing completion, with artifacts ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Okta project progressing well with custom SDR enablement materials receiving positive feedback](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Clerk project requires extra attention due to investor involvement; deep dive scheduled with founder next week](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Interval moving forward with content schema review; awaiting approvals to begin content generation](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)

## Topics

### Content OS and Client Onboarding

  - [Content OS, direct competitors, and audience competitors setup nearly complete](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Artifacts finished and awaiting client review](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Atlas workspace and pipelines set up](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Client communication via Loom video; positive feedback received](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Scaling to 5 content refreshes next week](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [5 updated articles sent for review, minor feedback received](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

### Okta Project Update

  - [Focus on enabling SDRs with tailored materials and artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Created 10+ hyper-specific artifacts, custom writing guidelines, and company briefs](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Demoed to Rachel (client) and former SDR-turned-sales-leader with positive reception](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Working on workflow integration with GrowthX engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Considering micro-app creation for workflow execution (similar to check.ai)](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)

### Sentinel-1 Progress

  - [Moving forward with CVE pages and Cybersecurity 101 content](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Client leadership attending Black Hat Conference, expecting slower progress for 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Anticipating speed increase in September](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)

### Interval Project Status

  - [Client reviewing content schema](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Awaiting approvals and timeline by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [Can start generating content once blog templates are approved](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [Publication dependent on client's migration timeline](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)

### Clerk Project (High Priority)

  - [Regenerating artifacts for review](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Extra attention required due to investor involvement (Karan)](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Aiming for significant improvement over Aerofs experience](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
  - [Deep dive with founder/CEO scheduled for early next week](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)

### Miscellaneous Updates

  - [Metronome project fully handed off](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [New strategy direction for unnamed client: refreshing additional 150 pieces, exploring new content types](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Analyzing traffic trends to identify successful refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete Content OS setup and await client feedback on artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Continue Okta SDR enablement material development and workflow integration](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Push for progress on Sentinel-1 despite client's temporary slowdown](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Await Interval's content schema approval to begin content generation](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Prioritize Clerk project: have George review regenerated artifacts, prepare for founder deep dive](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Analyze individual content performance for unnamed client to identify successful trends](https://fathom.video/share/DMBJsybL4tomdm4oFnad2HCg1yUFzY__?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)

action_items.description: Update Scrunch dashboard with new prompts from client
Regenerate artifacts for Clerk client. Ensure high quality for technical audience
Send regenerated Clerk artifacts to George for review before tomorrow
